title: Fix: cgroup is not set: internal libpod error after os reboot
body:
[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]
Closes #19175

This PR fix the bug 'cgroup is not set: internal libpod error after os reboot' on system without systemd.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
None

comments.body: Restarted what looked like two network flakes
